title: Plumbing
lede: Commercial plumbing service across Greater Atlanta — domestic water, sanitary, gas piping, backflow prevention, and the cross-trade coordination that comes from running plumbing under the same roof as HVAC and electrical.
metaDescription: Commercial plumbing service and project work from C2H — domestic water, sanitary, gas piping, backflow, water heaters across Greater Atlanta.
featuresHeading: Commercial plumbing, from the meter to the fixture.
featuresLead: Service and project work for commercial facilities — restaurants, offices, healthcare, industrial. Sized for the kind of jobs a residential plumber can't take and a generalist GC won't.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2.5C12 2.5 6 9 6 14a6 6 0 1 0 12 0c0-5-6-11.5-6-11.5z"/></svg>
features.title: Domestic water systems
features.body: Service entrances, booster pumps, pressure-reducing valves, recirculation, expansion tanks, copper, PEX, CPVC, and PEX-AL-PEX installation and repair.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14M5 12v6h14v-6M12 6l-3 6h6l-3-6z"/></svg>
features.title: Sanitary & vent
features.body: Underslab and overhead sanitary, vent stack work, grease interceptors, ejector pits and lift stations, drain cleaning and high-pressure jetting.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M12 7v10M8 12h8"/></svg>
features.title: Backflow prevention
features.body: Certified backflow testing, installation, repair, and annual recertification. RPZ, DCDA, PVB. State-of-Georgia certified testers on staff.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 2v4M12 18v4M4.93 4.93l2.83 2.83M16.24 16.24l2.83 2.83M2 12h4M18 12h4"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/></svg>
features.title: Water heaters
features.body: Commercial water heater service and replacement — gas, electric, condensing, and heat-pump units. Tankless, semi-instantaneous, and storage. Recirculation tuning.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M8 2l8 0M8 22l8 0M12 2v20"/><path d="M9 7c0-1 1-2 3-2s3 1 3 2M9 17c0-1 1-2 3-2s3 1 3 2"/></svg>
features.title: Gas piping
features.body: Natural gas and propane service — service entrances, sub-meters, rooftop runs to RTUs and boilers, pressure testing, AHJ-witnessed leak checks.

features.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><path d="M12 6v6l4 2"/></svg>
features.title: Leak detection & response
features.body: Acoustic and thermal leak detection, slab leak isolation, emergency response for active leaks. Coordinated with restoration vendors when water damage has already happened.

whyParagraphs: Most commercial plumbing problems aren't actually plumbing problems. A boiler that won't fire might be a gas-pressure problem. A cooling tower with low make-up might be a backflow problem. A unit that's tripping breakers might have a recirculation pump locked rotor.
C2H runs plumbing in-house with HVAC and electrical, so the tech who shows up has visibility across all three trades. Faster diagnosis, fewer repeat trips, and one invoice instead of three.
whyBullets: Commercial-only — no residential service work competing for the calendar
Coordinated with HVAC for boilers, cooling towers, water heaters
ctaHeading: Let's get you on the schedule.
ctaParagraph: Service calls, backflow recerts, project work, or full mechanical-room overhauls — describe what you're seeing and we'll come out, scope it, and send a proposal.
